name: Zoho People HRMS API
what_it_does: Zoho People REST API for cloud-based HRMS covering core HR, time tracking, attendance, leave management, and performance. Enables AI agents to manage employee records, track attendance and leave, access performance review data, handle time tracking, and integrate HR data into payroll and business workflows. Zoho People is part of the Zoho ecosystem.
use_cases: Managing employee profiles and org charts from HR onboarding agents
Tracking attendance and leave requests from workforce management agents
Retrieving performance review and goal data from HR analytics agents
Integrating Zoho People HR data into payroll and finance workflow agents
not_for: Global enterprise HCM (Zoho People targets SMB/mid-market)
Standalone payroll without broader HR needs
best_when: An SMB or mid-market organization using Zoho People wants AI agents to manage employee records, track leave/attendance, and integrate HR data into business workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee HR data is highly sensitive personal data. Requires strict access controls, data processing agreements, and GDPR compliance for EU employees.

auth.notes: Zoho People uses Zoho OAuth 2.0. Scopes include ZOHOPEOPLE.employee.READ, ZOHOPEOPLE.leave.READ, etc. Access tokens expire in 1 hour with refresh rotation.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential HR, Professional, Premium, Enterprise, and People Plus plans scaling employees
pricing.notes: Competitive HRMS pricing. Part of Zoho ecosystem. API included on paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee HR data (salary, leave, performance) requires strict access controls
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
OAuth tokens expire in 1 hour — refresh token rotation essential
Zoho People form-based data model requires understanding before integration
Leave and attendance APIs have date-range limitations — paginate carefully for large date ranges
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Sensitive employee HR data including leave, attendance, and performance. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular HR scopes. Multi-region data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Sensitive employee HR data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular scopes. Multi-region data residency.
